selected_markets.title: Will Jakub Kaczmarek win the Jakub Kaczmarek vs Lukasz Bernacki Table Tennis Match Winner?
Will Lukasz Bernacki win the Jakub Kaczmarek vs Lukasz Bernacki Table Tennis Match Winner?
Will Milosz Piecowski win the Dawid Kotwica vs Milosz Piecowski Table Tennis Match Winner?

valuations.rationale: Mid-price of 0.62 appears inflated relative to complementary market (LBE at 0.51). Probabilities should sum to ~1.0; current sum is 1.13, indicating overpricing of Kaczmarek. Adjusted down to 0.549 accounting for market inefficiency and typical table tennis match uncertainty.

Complementary to JKA market. Mid-price of 0.51 is slightly elevated. Fair probability should be approximately 1 - 0.549 = 0.451. Moderate confidence due to limited volume and no additional match context.

Mid-price of 0.555 is reasonable and internally consistent (complementary market would be ~0.445). Slight adjustment to 0.555 reflects mid-market estimate. Lower confidence due to limited volume (28k) and lack of player history/context.
